name: GCP Artifact Registry orphan canonical image cleanup
__comment__: Delete digest-keyed GAR image nodes only after repository-image, manifest, and migration cleanup have removed stale references. This is invoked from the scoped GAR sync path, but intentionally deletes only globally orphaned canonical images because GCPArtifactRegistryImage is digest-scoped rather than project-scoped.

statements.__comment__: Delete stale canonical digest-keyed GAR images that no graph relationship still uses. Keep images written in the current sync because repository-image IMAGE relationships may be loaded later in the same run.
statements.query: MATCH (img:GCPArtifactRegistryImage) WHERE NOT exists((img)--()) AND (img.lastupdated IS NULL OR img.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG) WITH img LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE img RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted
